scripts.build:release:macos: npm run prepare:server -- --force && tauri build --bundles app && mkdir -p src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg && ../scripts/create-macos-dmg.sh src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos "Talktome Server" "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/Talktome Server_${npm_package_version}_aarch64.dmg"
scripts.build:release:windows: npm run prepare:server -- --force && tauri build --bundles nsis
